{"society_power": 9.0, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Ballot Act, union legalization, and mass party mobilization", "reasoning": "The secret ballot, Trade Union Act, and mass party/press mobilization meaningfully strengthened society, while state administrative gains (civil service exams, education and public health boards) roughly offset the strains of the Long Depression, keeping the state near its already-strong level."}
